zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard De Talemasche於1149年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可波利 聖 艾德蒙茲時，他的父親Petrus de Talemasche34歲，母親Matilda de Chevauchesul16歲。他和Avicia Taillard至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1246年在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字享年98歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯托克 打馬字。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard De Talemasche was born in 1149, in Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, his father, Petrus de Talemasche, was 34 and his mother, Matilda de Chevauchesul, was 16. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Avicia Taillard. He died about 1246, in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98, and was buried in Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard De Talemasche est né en 1149, à Bury St Edmunds, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Petrus de Talemasche, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Matilda de Chevauchesul, avait 16 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Avicia Taillard. Il est décédé environ 1246, à Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans, et a été enterré à Stoke Talmage, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard De Talemascheが1149年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブリー スト エドムンズで生まれた時，父Petrus de Talemascheは34歳，母Matilda de Chevauchesulは16歳であった。彼はAvicia Taillardとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1246年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジで98歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアストク タルマッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈
ko.lifeSummary: Richard De Talemasche(이)가 1149년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 버이 스트 에드먼드즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Petrus de Talemasche(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda de Chevauchesul(은)는 16세였다. 그는 Avicia Taillard(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1246년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에서 98세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스토크 탤마지에 묻혔다.

ru.Bury St. Edmunds, Suffolk, England: бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard De Talemasche родился в 1149 г. в местности бури ст эдмундс, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Petrus de Talemasche было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Matilda de Chevauchesul, 16. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Avicia Taillard. Он умер около 1246 г. в местности сток талмадж, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет и был похоронен в местности сток талмадж, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
